name: ''The Fool's Curse'' || Tarot The Movie
description: "The Fool" is one of the demonic manifestations of the tarot deck's Major Arcana cards It is a terrifying, anthropomorphic jester figure that appears to terrorize the main characters after they call upon the cursed deck. The film's version of The Fool embodies both the spontaneity of the upright card and the recklessness and naivety of its reversed meaning.
creator: Imsoboredong
